spec_match.rationale: Requests PiP with copyStyleSheets true and false, reports Chrome 148's native copied-sheet count, and labels the manual regular-sheet fallback used only for visual contrast when native copying is absent.

interactive.rationale: Theme picker plus styled, bare, and close controls drive real Document PiP windows and update the live status readout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now promises copied-style and bare-baseline comparison and shows exactly that contrast.

edge_cases.rationale: The pre-copy baseline is an explicit copyStyleSheets=false path with a default Times/transparent/no-border computed-style readout.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables for design system tokens.

summary: MCP Chrome 148.0.0.0 on macOS loaded http://localhost:3000/v131/document-picture-in-picture-copy-document-mode/css-inherit/, changed the theme to editorial, opened the styled PiP path, opened the bare copyStyleSheets=false path, and closed PiP. The styled path found native copied stylesheet count 0 in this browser and clearly reported the manual regular-sheet fallback before showing the editorial styling; the bare path stayed default Times/transparent/no-border. Console was clean after the label fix and network requests were 200/204.
